channel.title: U.S. Financial News, Markets, Banking and Business — Investment Banking
channel.description: Latest U.S. market news, banking updates, business insights, investigations, and real-time analysis to keep you informed on key financial developments

item.title: Texas Flash Flood Emergency: Guadalupe River Surges as Deadly Flood Wave Hits Hill Country
item.description:
Texas is facing a major flash flood emergency as heavy rains send dangerous floodwaters through Hill Country, with the Guadalupe River surging and emergency crews conducting large-scale rescues.

Key points:
• Guadalupe River levels rose rapidly as officials warned of a dangerous flood wave moving downstream.
• Heavy rainfall and Texas Hill Country geography created life-threatening flash flood conditions.
• Emergency teams rescued residents from homes, vehicles and flooded areas using boats and helicopters.
• Officials urged residents to evacuate, avoid flooded roads and follow emergency alerts.

Read the full article: Texas Flash Flood Emergency: Guadalupe River Surges as Deadly Flood Wave Hits Hill Country
